steps.title: Use the input power
steps.content:
The function $h$ uses the square of its input. Since $t=\sqrt{52}$, the squared input is:
$$t^2=(\sqrt{52})^2=52$$

steps.title: Evaluate the second function
steps.content:
Substitute that value into $h$:
$$h(t)=4+\frac{t^2}{2}=4+\frac{52}{2}$$
$$h(t)=4+26=30$$
The answer is C.
